Title: Some patterns of state transferring of system – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Some patterns of state transferring of system%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/05/10/）%改行%・Some patterns of state transferring of system%改行%An information is a cluster of data which connect to other data semantically. There is represented by object models or entities. Normalized data stored at persistent tier is modified at presentation layer to information by user operations. So state management is almost similar with tracing user operations.%改行%One of implement state management is Rich Client Application. There is high function controls –such as the DataGrid control and so on– used in the application. The controls holds state at presentation layer. So in Rich Client Application, data semantically connection is done at presentation layer, then information is transfered to persistent tier directly.%改行%Second selection is the RESTful service client application. The application uses many very short transactions. Data semantically connection is not made one transaction but made by multiple transactions usingREpresentationalStateTransfer API service.%改行%There is several other approaches, the Scaffolding CRUD pages uses the DBcontext for connect user’s operations with persistent tier directly. BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%The microservice design pattern%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/04/08/）%改行%・The microservice design pattern%改行%The microservice design pattern is fit to the agile development process and the Microsoft Azure provides it’s runtime environment as the Microsoft Azure Service Fabric. The architecture is considering partition tolerance same as a distributed system. This article describes microservices, one of a distributed system, is not manages state at persistent tier but at middleware tier.%改行%If you want to read detail of state machine or state management, please refer toリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=2101）.%改行%When system is used by few users, the system shares state at persistent tier is not prompting problem, but a lot of users access system, state of information will conflict and many optimistic lock occurs. As generally, design a processing break down, or short transaction mixing, because a grand design of persistent tier takes large cost.%改行%The microservice desing pattern is one of the design pattern for it. Therefore microservices communicate each other and have each persistent tiers respectively. It is important for designing microservice that is distributed system.%改行%So, state transferring of common N-tier system from state full UI-tier to state less function tier is designed in microservice design pattern to state management at state full middle ware.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/statefullmiddleware.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2015/05/23/mvvm-creating-reusable-flyout-control-composite/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/05/10/some-patterns-of-transferring-state-of-system/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/04/08/microservice-design-pattern/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: A concept of the actor model, for a distributed system – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%A concept of the actor model, for a distributed system%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/07/11/）%改行%・A concept of the actor model, for a distributed system%改行%Inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=2051）, I described that an information is created by connecting data semantically, and at UI tier in system, user’s operations connect data and transfer to persistent tier in system, so It’s state should be managed in system. In a distributed system, state is not shared at persistent tier but shared at middleware with other systems, services or users. And persistent tier is ready for individual system respectively in distributed system.%改行%State full middleware is feature of distributed system, it’s design and implementation is so hard. As a result, A concept of the actor model was born for one of respond as solution for cost reduction of distributed system development. In the actor model, an actor send message of function execution to another actor, and also an actor can create another actor necessary. An actor send message asynchronously and does not wait response of sent message, so the model is fit to concurrent execution. Then the message is store at queue of actor which receive it.%改行%For achieve this, an actor have to know an address of an actor to send message. And need to cache the state. An address of an actor to send message is resolved by distributed directory. A cache of state is covered by persistent tier of each actors respectively.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/Actor.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/05/10/some-patterns-of-transferring-state-of-system/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/08/13/the-virtual-actor-is-the-actor-model-for-cloud-ready/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/07/11/2161/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: The Virtual Actor is the Actor model for cloud ready – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%The Virtual Actor is the Actor model for cloud ready%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/08/13/）%改行%・The Virtual Actor is the Actor model for cloud ready%改行%The Virtual Actor design pattern has an objective that it makes the Actor model more available used on cloud. The Actor model is mentioned mathematical concept, it’s perpose is not to explain how to implementation.The Virtual Actor design pattern describes a way control over actors on system resources when use the Actor model. The system is distributed system and its resources is equipped on across network.%改行%The Actor model needs actor’s phisical address when message to it. On distributed system, it’s managed by distributed directory that constructed several distributed hash tables. When an actor is active (ready for use), Invoker needs to know it’s address or the system must provides refer distination to invoker. If it deactive, the system have to activate and refer it’s address.%改行%When it is not need anymore, the system dispose it. Or if an actor is missing because network is not available, the system create new computing (whether at virtual computing of cloud or phisical machine of on-premises) and put the actor on it, and if needs migration, the system transfers it’s transaction to new instance of the actor.%改行%When the system is structured by clustering environments, we have to guarantee the actor is single instance. And we have to guarantee the messaging communication thread is run in single process.%改行%The Virtual Actor design pattern releases developers from these hard work which only distributed system specialists can accomplish. And Microsoft Azure provides virtual actor runtime environment as Service Fabric Reliable Actor.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/VirtualActorMessaging.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/07/11/2161/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/09/02/microsoft-azure-provides-the-virtual-actor-as-service-fabric-reliable-actor/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/08/13/the-virtual-actor-is-the-actor-model-for-cloud-ready/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Microsoft Azure provides the Virtual Actor as Service Fabric Reliable Actor – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Microsoft Azure provides the Virtual Actor as Service Fabric Reliable Actor%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/09/02/）%改行%・Microsoft Azure provides the Virtual Actor as Service Fabric Reliable Actor%改行%The Virtual Actor provided by Microsoft Azure Service Fabric Reliable Actor manages actor’s physical address and a context which represents actor’s physical address. Developer can use Microsoft.ServiceFabric.Actors.Runtime namespace for actor implementation. This feature manages state of the actor, actor id as deterministic hash of a partition on node of cluster, uri of the actor is placed, timer or reminder useable to the actor, useable event task when the actor active or deactive, and so on.%改行%And also, Microsoft Azure Service Fabric Reliable Actor is guaranteed consistency of actor by reliable service. This consistency is that the actor is instanced always single, and implicit activate and deactivate or dispose the actor. also the consistency is guranteed by messaging via single thread and invoke method by messaging executes only once running.%改行%When developer uses only the namespace and Microsoft.ServiceFabric.Actors namespace which represent the Reliable Actor, it can develop the microservice on the Microsoft Azure.%改行%The Actor model of the Microservices is very small or simple function, so a solution is realize by collaborate these actor services. the solution system has a portal UI as web app or client native app, mobile app, phisical device of IoT and so on. Please refer toリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=2161）. An actors is invoked from client app as web app. For use Service Fabric feature effectively, connect web app and web service weakly with using Open Web Interface for .NET（OWIN）. As a result, we can arrange various types of servers and program languages.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/OWIN.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/08/13/the-virtual-actor-is-the-actor-model-for-cloud-ready/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/01/12/create-state-full-service-web-app/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/09/02/microsoft-azure-provides-the-virtual-actor-as-service-fabric-reliable-actor/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%OAuth login%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/29/）%改行%OAuth is open standard for authorization of authority. It’s important point of OAuth that authority is specified by contents provider, and it’s represent as the Scope.%改行%A client app asserts two authority, one is that identity is correct, and another is that how any scope of information the identity can access.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/OAuthLoginWeb.png）%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Samples-UWPSamples/tree/master/OAuthLogIn）%改行%リンク（https://www.microsoft.com/ja-jp/dev/products/community.aspx）is free%改行%・xaml%改行%OAuth is almost background process of an app also includes a loop of the dialog which is input account and password by user. So developers put a button control which call OAuth on a XAML file, and aquire response then relate the process to appropriate process.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/OAuthLoginXAML.png）%改行%・xaml.cs%改行%The AuthLauncher_Click handler processes in the code behind defines three processes.%改行%The first is aquire the value of the FlipView which is selected by user. After that, specify identity provider that user selected.%改行%The second is throwing request to identity provider selected by user, it using fixed value as Facebook in sample code.%改行%The last one is aquire first response which represent that identity is correct then pull the token value and throw with it as second request which aquires an information of user on Facebook.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/OAuthLoginXAML.cs_.png）%改行%If Facebook app has created, this sample works well.%改行%リンク（https://developers.facebook.com/docs/apps/register）.%改行%リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/ja-jp/azure/active-directory/develop/active-directory-v2-app-registration）.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/OAuthLoginApp.png）%改行%・xaml%改行%・xaml.cs%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/22/flipview/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/06/bitmap-image/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/29/oauth-login/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Create state full service web app%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/01/12/）%改行%・Create state full service web app%改行%If the microservices solution system has web app as UI, and create with OWIN, I described inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=2621）that we can available feature of Service Fabric maximally. This knowledge has been provided by the Azure Service Fabric Team of Microsoft. We should read ‘リンク（https://blogs.msdn.microsoft.com/azureservicefabric/）‘. It’s so easy to create web app includes OWIN architecture for service fabric microservice by reading ‘Introduction to Service Fabric (Lab) ? Part 1’ of the blog.%改行%So I’m going to create web app by imitate procedure of this blog. If you want to know more overview,リンク（https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/documentation/learning-paths/service-fabric/）of Microsoft Azure provides a lot of information for developing application serve on the cloud, this article focuses as the microservice development. First step is create service fabric application using template of Visual Studio. This step needsリンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/service-fabric/service-fabric-get-started）. Run Visual Studio (in this article, use version 2015) as administrator, and create new project of the Service Fabric application.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/createServiceFabricApp1.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/SelectStatelessWebAPI.png）%改行%Then push F5 button and run application.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/FirstShot.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/logging.png）%改行%Created solution is constituted both Microsoft Azure deploy package and Microsoft Azure stateless web api. This application is already runnable application, so inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=3001）, I will describe procedures to incorporate reliable actor to this application.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/SolutionConstruction.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2016/09/02/microsoft-azure-provides-the-virtual-actor-as-service-fabric-reliable-actor/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/02/12/incorporate-the-realiable-actor-service-to-web-app-solution/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/01/12/create-state-full-service-web-app/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Setting Azure Bot Service – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Cognitive Service,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Setting Azure Bot Service%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AISeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/13/）%改行%Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services QnA Maker helps creating knowledge base which chatbot app uses. In case knowledge base created, it have to publish for chatbot app.%改行%Then create bot from [Create Bot] button of QnA Maker portal page when the knowledge base publishing done. It is super easy to create bot with QnA Maker.%改行%・Start from QnA Maker portal%改行%Inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4500）, created knowledge base with QnA Maker.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/My-knowledge-base.png）%改行%The publish feature of QnA portal console connect between knowledge base which is publishing and Microsoft Azure Bot Service creating new.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Publish-a-knowledge-base.png）%改行%・Publish knowledge base%改行%Select [Publish] button of [Publish] tab, window is transferred to success view when publishing process is done. Then it shows you [Create Bot] button and how to post request to QnA Maker API.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-Bot-from-QnA-Maker-portal.png）%改行%・Test with Postman app for health check of QnA Maker API%改行%Test using Postman app to confirm QnA maker API responds same answer as test of previous article. It represents that published knowledge base is working well.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/test-use-postman.png）%改行%・Create Bot%改行%Create Bot from [Create Bot] button of success view makes creating Microsoft Azure Bot Service easily. Transfer to Azure portal and set parameters to create Bot service window. Then I modify some parameters such as cost level parameter and so on (should not change parameters of QnA auth key, location of Application insight, App service plan and location : it specified on existing Cognitive Services QnA Maker). Sorry for Japanese screen shot, because these settings depends on Japanese screen shot ofリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4500）.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-Bot-window.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/cognitive-service/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/02/29/get-user-information-of-azure-active-directory-account-using-microsoft-graph-api/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/14/preparing-to-create-the-app-using-programmable-authentication-flow/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/13/cognitive-services-qna-maker-setting-azure-bot-service/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Control Facebook scope – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Control Facebook scope%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/13/）%改行%When use the OAuth v2.0, apps is able to control scope of Facebook information. This article explains how to create app which can use OAuth with general identity provider. As example, describes the case of Facebook.%改行%Flow of process is that the WebAuthenticationResult.ResponseStatus is checked, and then the SetDisplayElements method breaks the json response to the profile elements, and put them into the ViewModel properties respectively. The NotifyUser method puts values into UI element in the last step.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/ControlFacebookScope.png）%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Samples-UWPSamples/tree/master/ScorpeSetting）%改行%リンク（https://www.microsoft.com/ja-jp/dev/products/community.aspx）is free%改行%・Data model%改行%The FlipView holds providers which has several common properties of using OAuth. So several common properties set in the base class of provider class as the data model.%改行%The Facebook class is extend from the base class and customise for Facebook API at constructor, for exsample, there is a list of scope name, application ID, request URL for OAuth and redirect URL and so on.%改行%It’s called from the constructor of the view model used for the Contents page. In the same timing, the data model holds an icon of identity provider with caption for the FlipView control.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/DMControlFacebookScopeDM.png）%改行%Importance for customizing the Facebook class is setting scope parameter of OAuth request.%改行%Scope parameter defines an authority of accessing any information region and these information is defined by contents provider, these authority permit by user.%改行%Facebook is an identity provider and a contents provider in this case.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/ControlFacebookScopeFBClassScope.png）%改行%Information of scope parameter is provided byリンク（https://developers.facebook.com/docs/facebook-login/permissions/）.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/ControlFacebookScopeWeb.png）%改行%・xaml%改行%・xaml.cs%改行%・Base class of providers%改行%・Facebook class%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/06/bitmap-image/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/20/intelligent-cloud-with-microsoft-graph/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/13/control-facebook-scope/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Make embed code for Bot Client App – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Cognitive Service,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Office App,Office Web App,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Make embed code for Bot Client App%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/06/30/）%改行%Using Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services QnA Maker is super easy way to create chatbot app.%改行%I wrote two articles [リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4500）] and [リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4500）] before this article. Next, this article describes making embed code for the chatbot client app.%改行%・Test in web chat%改行%Web app bot created when the knowledge base publish process has done has a test feature in the Azure portal. So if input the phrase as same as the phrase was used at [Test] console in the QnA maker portal page when the knowledge base created, can confirm the same answer is replied on the test console of Web app bot test feature of the Azure portal.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/TestInWebChat.png）%改行%・Web Chat Channel%改行%And already has one channel in Channels list in Azure console. We will create a chatbot client app use this channel.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Channels.png）%改行%・Get embed codes%改行%Azure web app bot Channels list has auto-generate feature of web bot embedded code, use [Get bot embed codes] link to get code for a client web app.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Bot-embed-code.png）%改行%・Set secret code to iframe parameter%改行%Press [Copy] link next to the text of [Embed code] text area, and paste to anywhere you want. Then press either [Show] links to show secret code and copy secret code and replace ‘YOUR_SECRET_HERE’ in the last of [src] attribute of [iframe] tag of copied text for completing bot embed code creating.%改行%Check both [Enable Preview] checkbox and [Block attachment upload from user] checkbox, then press [Copy] link of Embed code text area and keep anywhere you want. At last, press [Done] button at the bottom.%改行%*[Enable Preview] check is not required, If you want to test the preview feature before the feature generalizes, it may be checked.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Set-embed-code-parameters.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/cognitive-service/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/office-web-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/04/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-create-knowledge-base-from-online-faq/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/07/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-create-bot-client-app/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/06/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-make-embed-code-for-bot-client-app/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: タイルとバッジのライフサイクル設計編 – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 8.1 App,Windows Phone App,Windows Store App
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%タイルとバッジのライフサイクル設計編%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2015/02/02/）%改行%Windows 8.1からタイルの種類も増え、アプリケーションの独自性や機能などを表現しやすくなったので、ユーザー環境のスクリーンサイズやタイルサイズを考慮したデザインの自由度が向上しました。しかしながら、タイルやバッジの設置は、アプリケーション作成時に1度しか作業しない為おろそかになりがちな作業です。バッジとタイルのこれらの設定は、工数やフローの複雑さに大きく関係するため、開発者はMicrosoft Azure Notification Hubsを含めた設計に関わる必要があります。%改行%・通知内容と通知先%改行%アプリケーションの目的や機能と通知内容、通知先、ライフサイクルの関係%改行%バッジを含むタイルのUIデザインを設計する際は、通知のライフサイクルを考慮することが重要です。さまざまな検討要素が依存関係を持つからです。%改行%検討要素はいくつかありますが、「ロゴとアプリケーション名のタイルへの配置」「ライブ・タイル、セカンダリ・タイル、サイズ」「バッジの必要性」「 通知内容と通知先、ライフサイクル」「アプリケーションの目的と機能」は依存関係にあることに注意してください。%改行%そのため、まず「アプリケーションの目的と機能」が明確化されている必要があります。業務アプリケーションであっても要求仕様が明確化されていないケースが多々あり、要件定義が機能の羅列になっているケースすらあります。%改行%要求仕様は、要求仕様書のような大げさなものである必要はありません。まずは「バッジが必要かどうか」を検討できる範囲の要求仕様が明確化されていればいいわけです。要求が明確化されていてれば、続いて「セカンダリ・タイルが必要かどうか」を検討できますし、「ライブ・タイルを使うべきかどうか」「どのタイル・サイズが適切か」が明確化されていきます。%改行%そうすることで「バッジ・タイルの設計、ロゴの配置」ができるようになるので、検討の順番が重要だということを理解してください。%改行%通知の必要性：そのアプリケーションには個別通知や全体通知が必要ですか？%改行%アプリケーションに認証機能がある&パーソナライズが目的である%改行%→%改行%個別通知が必要%改行%アプリケーションの機能拡張やデータの追加・更新など%改行%→%改行%全体通知が必要%改行%特定地域や特定のグループ（ある範囲のデータを利用など）%改行%→%改行%グループ通知が必要%改行%バッジの必要性：そのアプリケーションでは情報の数が重要ですか？%改行%コンテンツ数、情報数に意味を持つアプリケーションの場合%改行%→%改行%要約通知※を使う%改行%コンテンツ数、情報数よりもその有無や多さに意味がある場合%改行%→%改行%システム・グリフを使う%改行%数値から複数の意味を想像でき、通知の意味を失う場合%改行%→%改行%システム・グリフを使う%改行%※ひとつのバッジイメージとひとつの数値の組合せ%改行%タイルの機能の検討：そのアプリケーションでは情報が多様であることが重要ですか？%改行%異なるコンテンツ・スコープのコンテンツ提供・更新をウリにしている%改行%→%改行%セカンダリ・タイルを使う%改行%機能提供のアプリではなく、コンテンツ提供を目的としている%改行%→%改行%ライブ・タイルを使える%改行%複数の情報や詳細情報の通知がユーザーにとって有益である%改行%→%改行%ワイド/大・タイルを使う%改行%最後にライフサイクルを検討することになります。%改行%配信方法の検討：そのアプリケーションでは情報がどのように更新されますか？%改行%即時性が重要な通知がある%改行%→%改行%プッシュ/スケジュール%改行%ユーザーがアプリから離れる可能性がある%改行%→%改行%ローカル%改行%時間が通知の重要なファクターである%改行%→%改行%スケジュール%改行%固定的な定期的通知がユーザーに有用である%改行%→%改行%定期的ポーリング%改行%ユーザーは情報の更新を予測できない%改行%→%改行%プッシュ%改行%併せてmsdnも参照してください（リンク（http://msdn.microsoft.com/ja-jp/library/windows/apps/hh779721.aspx））。%改行%このように「アプリケーションの目的と機能」、「通知内容と通知先、ライフサイクル」、「ライブ・タイル、セカンダリ・タイル、サイズ」「バッジの必要性」が検討できたら、実際にリンク（http://www.processtune.com/blog/?p=1150）を行っていきます。%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-8-1-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-phone-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Title: How to set attributes of Azure Active Directory application for impersonated users – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Microsoft Graph,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%How to set attributes of Azure Active Directory application for impersonated users%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/09/30/）%改行%OAuth 2.0 that Microsoft Graph API provided, provides user-interaction authentication flow and user-less authentication flow.%改行%If an app uses user-less authentication flow to access the resource as RPA or other autorun functions, an app should have minimum permission for they need. The permission is not the whole of there lifecycle. Permission is requested only time when the app access the target resource. And permission is limited access to only target resources.%改行%In this case, short-time access and one-time use is best. Microsoft Graph API provides client_credential grant flow and password grant flow as user-less authentication flow, the impersonated user uses the Application ID as account and the Client secret as the password in these flows.%改行%The Application ID and the Client secret are kept at attributes of the Azure Active Directory application.%改行%・Set the Client secret%改行%Create an Azure Active Directory application, if needs please read the article ‘リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）‘. And select [Certificates & secrets] on the target Azure Active Directory application of Azure portal, and press [New Client secret] button.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/newclientsecret.png）%改行%Put description into [Description] section and stay [Expires] section as [in 1 year] radio button, then press [Add] button.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/addclientsecret.png）%改行%Copy the Client secret and keep anywhere the correct place such as the Microsoft OneDrive Vault.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/copyclientsecret.png）%改行%・Postman%改行%リンク（https://learning.postman.com/）is easy way to test Microsoft Graph API.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/postman.png）%改行%Put ‘https://login.microsoftonline.com/__YOUR TENNANT ID copy from Directory (tennant) ID of Azure Portal__/oauth2/token’ into the address box next to the method select list (the select list is selected as [POST] in the capture below). And put post body items key and value pair as below.%改行%key : client_id and value : copy from Application (client) ID of Azure portal.%改行%key : client _secretand and value : copy from where kept place at when client secret issued.%改行%key : grant_type and value : put ‘client_credentials’.%改行%Then press [send] button.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/sendpost.png）%改行%This access_token has minimum permission, its scope is ‘User.Read’ which is delegated to this Azure Active Directory application as impersonated user. And its expire is one hour.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/API-permission.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/08/31/create-azure-active-directory-application/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/10/30/microsoft-graph-api-provides-several-grant-types-of-the-oauth-2-0-authorization-framework/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/09/30/how-to-set-attributes-of-azure-active-directory-application-for-impersonated-users/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%appsettings.json in C# .NET Core mvc web app%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AuthenticationAuthorizationSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/04/20/）%改行%This article describes how to set configuration values and to acquire them in the controller of mvc web app.%改行%This article uses the code sample of the article ‘リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5509）‘, thus please download it before reading this article.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/ShareOneDriveItem）%改行%・Modify appsettings.json of the code sample%改行%The code sample of the article ‘リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5509）‘ accesses Microsoft Graph API. It has to declare a tenant id, client id, and so on when the app access to Microsoft Graph API, thus it might define at appsettings.json.%改行%{ "MicrosoftIdentity": { "TenantID": "__YOUR TENANT ID__", "ClientId": "__YOUR CLIENT ID__", "ClientSecret": "YOUR CLIENT SECRET", "Account": "__YOUR AAD ACCOUNT__", "Password": "__YOUR AAD PASSWORD__" }, "Logging": { ... }, "Console": { ... } } }%改行%・Modify Startup%改行%To acquire configuration values from the appsetting.json, modify the Startup method of the Startup class of the project. Add the below code under the statement ‘Configuration = configuration’. Use variables of the Environment object as a container to pass configuration values from the Startup class to Controllers.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/Startup.png）%改行%・Use the environment values from the controller%改行%In the AccountController, use the environment value ‘TenantID’ and ‘ClientId’ for login to Microsoft Azure Active Directory endpoint. Then transfer to the Index action of the Home controller.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/AccountController.png）%改行%In the Index action, the endpoint returns the authorized code when a user authenticates ended, so use the environment value ‘ClientSecret’ and the code to acquire user information from Microsoft Graph API.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/HomeController.png）%改行%When acquired the token from the code as the ‘user.read’ scope, the GetToken method of the AccessGraph class acquires user information of the login user from Microsoft Azure Active Directory, then returns a true value as means sign-in is successful. When sign-in successful, get the token as the ‘file.read’ scope using the ‘password’ grant type for acquiring the web link, so use the environment values ‘Account’ and ‘Password’.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/PasswordGrant.png）%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/ConfigureEnvironmentValue）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/office-web-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/reactjs-net/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/31/programmable-authentication-flow-for-accessing-to-microsoft-graph-2/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/05/23/change-jsonconvert-to-jsonserializer/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/04/20/appsettings-json-in-c-net-core-mvc-web-app/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: How to use the QnA Manker API well. – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%How to use the QnA Manker API well.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AISeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/11/02/）%改行%Microsoft provides the QnA Manker API service which is one of the Cognitive services. It’s very useful for developing a FAQ system.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/QnAMakerWeb.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/QnAMakerAPITop.png）%改行%・#1 Information architecture and limitation planning of information area%改行%Any FAQ system should be provided individual categories or locations, such as products, purposes of use, destinations and so on. it’s basis ofリンク（https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Information_architecture）for users and for also the knowledge base of a system too.%改行%In the case of FAQ system for the Microsoft Office application, if a question involved with the Office 365 and a question of the Worksheet functions of the Excel application is separated respectively, it’s useful for users.%改行%It’s useful for AI too, AI does high performance when It’s used in limited information area. For example, there is very popular question pattern “How to output some data of Excel ?”, the pattern is not enough about “to something”. it’s paper or usb, monitor, CSV file and so on. In this case, AI can choose several answers but their hit score is low and similar. Although if the question throw to FAQ chat bot system of specific information area, one or two answers which hit high score is responced from AI.%改行%Information architecture is important for using QnA Maker API. And limitation planning of information area makes QnA Maker API more worthy. Because the QnA Maker API use the model specialized for Indexing and Ranking.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IndexingAndRanking.png）%改行%リンク（https://qnamaker.ai/Documentation）%改行%・#2 Ready its data of Knowledge base%改行%The QnA Maker API can import data from file of Word type, PDF type and text type, also import from FAQ website URL with analyse contents of page. So there is several pattern for manage knowledge base lifecycle.%改行%It is very simple, basic and naturally that the FAQ website use as master of knowledge base.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/QnAMakerKBLifecycleFAQ.png）%改行%・#3 Lifecycle of knowledge base%改行%I recommend using Excel file for maintenance knowledge base lifecycle management.Because easy to set line break and hyperlink when create answer.%改行%The QnA Maker API send an answer text with line breaks, if the TSV file which is exported from knowledge base Excel includes cell”s text with line break.%改行%And the QnA Maker API send an answer text with hyperlink, if Excel cell is set hyper link.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/KBLifecycle.png）%改行%If want to set hyperlink to a part of text of cell, set below text.%改行%Edward Lodewijk van Halen [Source](http://www.starnostar.com/Eddie-Van-Halen-Question-and-Answers-Edward-Lodewijk-van-Halen-Question-Answers/9683/FAQ/)%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Rock-Archist-QA-List.xlsx）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/27/scope-control-of-the-microsoft-graph/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/11/09/how-to-create-the-qna-manker-my-service/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/11/02/how-to-use-the-qna-manker-api-well/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Intelligent cloud with Microsoft Graph. – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Intelligent cloud with Microsoft Graph.%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/20/）%改行%The Office 365 API v2.0 exposes from the Microsoft Graph, so the Microsoft Graph is gateway of information as files of the OneDrive, email, schedule, a task of the Planner and so on.%改行%The gateway also provides authentication as SSO with Azure Active Directory, Facebook, on premise Active Directory, Twitter and so on.%改行%The Intelligent cloud provided Microsoft is not only Microsoft Graph but Microsoft provides many services from Microsoft Azure, although Microsoft Graph accomplishes important roll of the Intelligent cloud.%改行%There is the SDK for using the Intelligent cloud from any client apps created by iOS , Android, UWP, web apps and so on. So the Intelligent edge apps creation is easy with the Visual Studio.%改行%This article explain how to develop client app as the Intelligent edge using Microsoft Graph.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeWeb.png）%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Graph/tree/master/MicrosoftGraph）%改行%リンク（https://www.microsoft.com/ja-jp/dev/products/community.aspx）is free%改行%This web site is concept of the Intelligent Cloud and Intelligent Edge from Microsoft.%改行%リンク（https://news.microsoft.com/features/microsoft-aims-empower-every-developer-new-era-intelligent-cloud-intelligent-edge/）%改行%・SDK%改行%The helper class ofリンク（https://github.com/microsoftgraph/uwp-csharp-connect-sample）conceals complex process of OAuth v2.0. This article uses UWP sample though, there is many app types samples.%改行%At first, Modifyリンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Samples-UWPSamples/tree/master/ScorpeSetting）. Import the namespace ‘Microsoft.Graph’ and ‘Microsoft.Identity.Client’ from the NuGet.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeNuGet.png）%改行%The next, import the AuthenticationHelper class, and modify the namespace to name of the project. This sample uses the namespace ‘Microsoft.Graph’.%改行%The AuthenticationHelper class has code below.%改行%static string clientId = App.Current.Resources["ida:ClientID"].ToString();%改行%So the code below should be added to App.xaml.%改行%<Application.Resources> <!-- Add your client id here. --> <x:String x:Key="ida:ClientID">ENTER_YOUR_CLIENT_ID</x:String> <x:String x:Key="ida:ReturnUrl">urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob</x:String> </Application.Resources>%改行%The last step is add code below at any place, and Press [F5]. The code put into the Profile.xaml.cs file in the sample code of this article.%改行%var oAuthClient = AuthenticationHelper.GetAuthenticatedClient(); if (oAuthClient != null) { var user = await oAuthClient.Me.Request().GetAsync(); result = user.GivenName; } else { result = "Internal Error when creating OAuth client"; } NotifyUser(result);%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeBothResult.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeAppResult.png）%改行%・App.xaml%改行%・xaml.cs%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/13/control-facebook-scope/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/27/scope-control-of-the-microsoft-graph/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/20/intelligent-cloud-with-microsoft-graph/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Split view – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Split view%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/08/）%改行%Two panes app, for example, an app which constructed with Menu tab area and contents area can create super easy if using the Split view control.%改行%This article explains how to relate the View Model of the Menu and Contents to the app which used in previous article which focuses to xBind binding, using MVVM design pattern.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Samples-UWPSamples/tree/master/SplitView/StatefulMiddleWareUWP）%改行%リンク（https://www.microsoft.com/ja-jp/dev/products/community.aspx）is free%改行%・XAML%改行%There is two XAML files structuring the app. I want to show you at the first XAML is displayed as contents area. And another one provides the Menu area.%改行%The Split view control provides the feature which keeps visible or invisible area can change dynamic toggle. So when the Menu list clicked, then the Selection Changed event handler of the List navigates any view model to target frame.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewMenuXAML.png）%改行%If needs the copy, use the GitHub Gist at end of this article.%改行%The SplitView.Pane of the Split view holds the Menu list of the app, the pane is opened as inline, so other area pushed to remaining area in the right hand of the Application window. The contents is put into the ContentsFrame of this right area.%改行%・XAML of contents%改行%Another one xaml file provides contents.%改行%Set xClass to the class of any content, And TextBox control needs TwoWay binding if it’s put value by user.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewContentsXAML.png）%改行%・XAML.cs%改行%For explaining the view model, It needs explain several classes.%改行%The Context class of the content page needs instancing at code behind of the page. This class extends from Page class provided by .NET Framework, and the keyword ‘ViewModel’ bind to data context of the page, so it’s specified class type and input instanced object of any class. This sample use the Content class. This class is displayed when the Menu list selection changed.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewContentsXAML.cs_.png）%改行%It’s same as the Context page,It needs instancing at code behind of the MainPage. The keyword ‘ViewModel’ specified class type and input instanced object of the MainVM class.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewMenuXAML.cs_.png）%改行%・ViewModel%改行%For explain, there is one view model in sample code though, it’s better that create individual class files for maintenance.%改行%The app’s Menu is displayed by list of the MenuContext class. The class has the Title property and the Body property, the Title property is used for Menu item label, and the Body property is used for contents page.%改行%If user click the app’s menu item, the value of the Body property pass to the ContentsFrame.Navigate() method at MenuList_SelectionChanged event handler of the page code behind. In initial timing, its selection is first item which indexed with zero(line 33 of above code).%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewMenuVM.png）%改行%The Content class of the content page instancing for the view model at constructor of the content page’s code behind(line 29 of Profile.xaml.cs). The class displays on app’s initial timing.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewContentVM.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/SplitViewApp.png）%改行%・MainPage.xaml%改行%・Profile.xaml%改行%・MainPage.xaml.cs%改行%・Profile.xaml%改行%・ViewModel%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/01/system-launcher/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/15/hamburger-menu/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/08/split-view/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Windows Store アプリのための情報アーキテクチャ – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,Windows 8 App,Windows Store App
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Windows Store アプリのための情報アーキテクチャ%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2013/06/07/）%改行%Windows Storeアプリはタッチデバイス、モバイルデバイスでの使用を意識する必要があります。そのようなWindows Storeアプリの特性を考慮したコンテンツ提供を行うためには、これまでのアプリケーションに比べ、情報設計がアプリケーションの操作性に大きく影響することを意識する必要があります。この記事では、情報設計の具体的な手順を解説しています。%改行%リンク（http://1drv.ms/PC62Ga）%改行%リンク（http://www.processtune.com/blog/?p=951）%改行%Windows Storeアプリの特徴%改行%タッチデバイス%改行%深い階層構造を持つアプリケーションであってはいけない%改行%細かい画面分割による大量の情報提供をすべきでない%改行%モバイルデバイス%改行%ローミングデータはオブジェクトモデルとして整備されていると扱いやすい%改行%コンテンツが提供する情報は、適切に整理されている必要がある。%改行%インフォメーションアーキテクチャ%改行%■理解の巨匠%改行%リチャード・ソール・ワーマン（1935.3.26～）が提唱した情報の分類に関する概念が基になっており、コンテンツ提供時の情報の設計手法の一つ。%改行%・情報の分類は5つ（Information anxiety 1）%改行%時系列、アルファベット、カテゴリー、位置、階層によって多くの情報は分類できる。（LATCH）%改行%・近年の情報アーキテクチャ（Information anxiety 2）%改行%時系列、アルファベット、カテゴリー、位置、連続量により情報を分類する。%改行%・階層化やタグ付けが情報アーキテクチャに含まれないわけ%改行%階層化はタグ付けで代替えでき、階層化とタグ付けは、情報を扱うユーザーによって変化する。また、情報が利用される場所においてもその構成が変化するため、一時的な分類や一意的な分類に有用。%改行%例：会議の議事録をファイルサーバーに保存（下図の左の階層化）→下図の右のタグ付けで表現可。%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/FileDirectoryHierarchy.png）図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/TagImage.png）%改行%情報のタグ付けによる表現は、階層による情報の表現を代替えできるが、その逆はできない。%改行%誰もがファイルの場所をわかるようにするために%改行%■コンテンツ・スコープが変わらない階層化%改行%情報アーキテクチャの情報分類に則った分類のひとつで構成される階層構造では、誰もが簡単に情報に到達できる（下図）。これをコンテンツ・スコープといい、これが混在する階層構造（上図左）では、下の階層に行ってから初めて次の操作がわかる（2013年4月27日の議事録にたどり着くためには、NECフォルダを開かないとWindows Phone app開発案件というフォルダがあることがわからない）。%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/Hierarchy.png）%改行%■コンテンツ・スコープが変わらないところまでメニュー等でナビゲートする%改行%情報を見せるときには、それぞれに最も重要な分類がある（ニュース速報の場合は時系列等）ため、他の分類についてはメニュー等で補助する。ニュース速報の場合は補助として「国内／海外」（位置）や「政治／犯罪」（カテゴリー）などが考えられる。しかしながら、過去ニュース・アーカイブのような場合は、時系列を補助とし、カテゴリーや位置を重要な分類とする見せ方が考えられる。%改行%情報を提供する目的によって分類の優先度が変わる%改行%オブジェクトモデルのアンチ・パターン%改行%コンテンツ・スコープに一貫性のある（情報アーキテクチャの分類を横断しない）情報群は、オブジェクト・モデルで情報特性としてアプリケーションに提供することが可能。MVVM、MVCにおけるモデルとして、オブジェクトとオブジェクトモデルの転送による業務ロジックの実装に分離できる。%改行%■階層化やタグ付けをオブジェクトモデルで提供することのデメリット%改行%オブジェクトモデルは、正規化モデル（DBなどに永続化される情報の形）からビジネス・ロジックを実現するために転送するデータの組み合わせの形であり、コンテンツ・スコープの一貫性がないモデルは、開発者がモデルをすべて理解する必要があるため開発効率が悪い。そのため、情報を扱うユーザーが自由に決められる階層化やタグ付けといった分類に関しては、オブジェクトモデルとして、情報特性をアプリケーションから固定的に提供すべきでない。%改行%■オブジェクトモデルは変化できない%改行%アプリケーションで提供するオブジェクトモデルを変更するためにはアプリケーションの改変が必要になり、UXを提供するWindows Store Appの場合、ユーザーの操作の変化やアプリケーションの進化にオブジェクトモデルは追従できない。そのため上記の開発視点としての非効率性に加え、エンドユーザーの情報操作の自由度のためにも階層化、タグ付けに関してオブジェクト・モデルで提供することはない。%改行%ユーザーが情報を操作する際の自由度を提供するのはオブジェクト・モデルではなく、アプリケーション・ロジック%改行%オブジェクトモデルのパターン%改行%■一意的な分類と一時的な分類%改行%階層化やタグ付けはオブジェクトモデルでなく機能として提供すべきで、それによってユーザーの操作の変化やアプリケーションの進化に対応することが可能になる。%改行%例：楽曲情報の分類における一時的な分類と企業内の部署管理における一意的な分類%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/TemporaryHierarchy.png）図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/UniqueryHierarchy.png）%改行%■特定の業務に対するオブジェクトの提供%改行%企業で部署を分類する場合は、情報の形の変化（部署の改変など）が少なく、異動や入退社が頻繁でなければ固定的な階層をオブジェクト・モデルとして提供することが可能（会社の組織構成はその会社の社員であれば知っておくべき情報であり、社外の人がその情報を操作する必要がない社内システムなどでは一意的なオブジェクト・モデルとして実装可能）。また、毎週注目曲を発信するような特定の目的にしか使わないアプリケーションの場合、一時的な情報の形をオブジェクト・モデルとして実装することが可能。%改行%これら特定の条件下以外では、一時的な分類や一意的な分類はオブジェクトモデルとして実装を行うのではなく、アプリケーション機能として、ユーザーが自由に設定できるようにしておく。%改行%限られた状況下でのみ、一時的または一意的なオブジェクト・モデルを提供できる%改行%設計時の注意事項%改行%■情報アーキテクチャの分類のプロパティを用意する%改行%情報アーキテクチャの分類にアプリケーションの業務ロジックを最低1つ当てはめる。%改行%位置%改行%Store（置き場所）、アーティスト出身地、活動中心地%改行%アルファベット%改行%アルファベット、五十音、多言語対応%改行%時系列%改行%発表日、発売日、データ更新時%改行%カテゴリー%改行%音楽ジャンル、言語%改行%連続量%改行%発表曲数、売上枚数、放送回数%改行%情報アーキテクチャの分類である位置モデルを継承してアーティストのメンバーの出生地情報をオブジェクト化した例%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/ObjectModelDiagram.png）%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/LocationInformation.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-8-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Invoke Reliable Actor from stateless Web API%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/DistributedComputingSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/03/13/）%改行%・Invoke Reliable Actor from stateless Web API%改行%Inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=3001）, the Reliable Actor is incorporated to stateless web API. In this article, create a feature that invoke the Reliable Actor from stateless web API. And in this article, the Reliable Actor has only a function which return stub data.%改行%リンク（https://1drv.ms/u/s!Amu7l9smpXSnopkgQnhEN913AUF3kQ）%改行%First step to create communication between stateless web API and the Reliable Actor is put the Microsoft.ServiceFabric.Actors namespace into stateless web API project. Select stateless web API on the solution explorer of Visual Studio and show context menu then select [Manage NuGet package…]. Input text ‘servicefabric.actor’ to inputbox of NuGet package manager and select [Microsoft.ServiceFabric.Actors] package then install it.%改行%Actor service project and its interface project incorporated to stateless web API project has been referred from Azure deploy package project. Then execute the solution.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/01ManageNuGetPackage.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/02NuGetActors.png）%改行%Actor service project and its interface project incorporated to stateless web API project has been referred from Azure deploy package project. Then execute the solution.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/03agreementNuGetActors.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/04installedActors.png）%改行%Next step is refer interface project of the Reliable Actor project. Select [Refer] and show context menu then select [Add reference], and select interface project of reference manager window.%改行%Actor service project and its interface project incorporated to stateless web API project has been referred from Azure deploy package project. Then execute the solution.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/05ReferActorProject.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/06referInterfaceProject.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/07fabricUri.png）%改行%Then open the ValueController class in the Controllers folder of solution explorer. Put the below code at class root as global scope of the class. Add [using namespace] statements by refactoring. The Service Fabric Local Cluster Manager teachs the service Uri.%改行%usingInquiryActor.Interfaces;%改行%usingMicrosoft.ServiceFabric.Actors;%改行%usingMicrosoft.ServiceFabric.Actors.Client;%改行%usingSystem;%改行%usingSystem.Collections.Generic;%改行%usingSystem.Web.Http;%改行%namespaceInquiryAsWebScrap.Controllers%改行%{%改行%[ServiceRequestActionFilter]%改行%public classValuesController : ApiController%改行%{%改行%private staticUriserviceUri =newUri(“fabric:/DigUpSongs/InquiryActorService”);%改行%private staticActorIdactorId =ActorId.CreateRandom();%改行%private staticIInquiryActor inquiryActor =ActorProxy.Create<IInquiryActor>(actorId, serviceUri);%改行%Last step is modify the Get method of the controller as below. Add [using namespace] statements by refactoring. And the ‘RunSynchronously’ of below code will change at next article, because the Actor model should not be guaranteed synchronous execution.%改行%usingSystem.Threading;%改行%usingSystem.Threading.Tasks;%改行%…%改行%publicIEnumerable<string> Get()%改行%{%改行%intresult = 0;%改行%CancellationTokentoken =newCancellationToken();%改行%newTask(async() => { result =awaitinquiryActor.GetCountAsync(token); }).RunSynchronously();%改行%return new string[] {“result is”, result.ToString() };%改行%}%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/03/08APIresult.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/03/10/tips-for-using-service-fabric-sdk-2/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/03/13/the-microservices-basis-provide-it-from-microsoft-azure-service-fabric/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/03/13/invoke-reliable-actor-from-stateless-web-api/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: HTTP/3 and the gRPC service in .NET framework – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,gRPC,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%HTTP/3 and the gRPC service in .NET framework%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/SeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/10/30/）%改行%リンク（https://github.com/grpc/proposal/blob/master/G2-http3-protocol.md）. This article describes how the gRPC connection affects HTTP connection, additionally, history of HTTP connection is also described.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/QRCodeCreation）%改行%• History of HTTP connection%改行%リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/ja-jp/azure/azure-functions/functions-bindings-register#extension-bundles?WT.mc_id=AZ-MVP-4029060）has proceeding technical standardization of internet. HTTP working group of IETF treats HTTP semantics, caching, and HTTP messaging. HTTP messaging uses the same semantics of HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2 and HTTP/3.%改行%Therefor RFC 9113 (HTTP/2 bis),リンク（https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9114/）(HTTP/3) andリンク（https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc9204/）affects to the gRPC connection although, Google and many technicians have contributing to the gRPC connection since April 2016 (when Google’s the Stubby was opened as theリンク（https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/gcp/grpc-a-true-internet-scale-rpc-framework-is-now-1-and-ready-for-production-deployments）). Afterwards the [リンク（https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/PROTOCOL-HTTP2.md）] since 2015, and the [リンク（https://github.com/grpc/proposal/blob/master/G2-http3-protocol.md）] since 2021 are opened on GitHub. There are standardised considering with the standard of IFTF.%改行%To simply say about only HTTP messaging, it has been improved as HTTP 0.9 (since 1990) – 1.0 (1996: POST etc.) – 1.1 (1997: Virtual host etc.) – 2.0 (2015: Stream) – 3.0 (2018: UDP communication).%改行%Evolution of HTTP messaging can explain with an aspect of connection and an aspect of data.%改行%As an aspect of connection, a setting of connection is shared between edge-side and service-side on streaming communication of HTTP/2, as result, edge-side can start next request without waiting for the end of before request.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/HTTPStreaming.png）%改行%As an aspect of data, the headers of HTTP/2 are compressed, and a content is communicated as binary. Thus, reduces workload of adding new connections because one connection can handle many requests.%改行%HTTP/3 reduces the communication initiation cost and transport layer confirmation response cost. And using UDP connection, it performs high-speed data transmission and reception.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/HTTPDataEvolution.png）%改行%• QUIC library for development of the gRPC connection%改行%Microsoft providesリンク（https://github.com/microsoft/msquic）that is implementation of IETF’sリンク（https://datatracker.ietf.org/wg/quic/about/）as library. This library is standard on Windows, thus provided API on over .NET 7.0. Though this library does TLS handshake, it is also provided Windows 11 build 22000 or later as Windows SChannel.%改行%Therefore does not use MsQuic explicitly on Windows 11 and .NET 7.0.%改行%There are other libraries for other languages for Quic connection such as below table.%改行%C++%改行%QUICHE%改行%Rust%改行%quinn%改行%C, Rust%改行%MsQuic%改行%C%改行%LSQUIC%改行%Python%改行%aioquic%改行%Rust%改行%s2n-quic%改行%Go%改行%quic-go%改行%Rust%改行%Neqo%改行%Implementation of gRPC over HTTP/3 is easy as below code that modified from the ‘Program.cs’ of the ‘GrpcGreeter’ folder ofリンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/gRPC）.%改行%builder.WebHost.ConfigureKestrel(options => { options.ListenAnyIP(5008); options.ListenAnyIP(7116, listenOptions => { // listenOptions.Protocols = Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.HttpProtocols.Http2; // listenOptions.Protocols = Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.HttpProtocols.Http1AndHttp2AndHttp3; listenOptions.Protocols = Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.HttpProtocols.Http3;// add only this line listenOptions.UseHttps(options => { options.ClientCertificateMode = ClientCertificateMode.RequireCertificate; options.ClientCertificateValidation = (certificate, chain, errors) => { options.ServerCertificate = certificate; return true; }; } ); }); });%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/grpc/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/09/30/deploy-the-grpc-service-to-the-azure-app-service/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2024/02/07/introducing-artificial-intelligence-ai-in-companies/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/10/30/http-3-and-the-grpc-service-in-net-framework/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog.
