BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%View the processing status of the Windows Runtime Component to Windows Store app%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2014/01/20/）%改行%View the processing status of the Windows Runtime Component to Windows Store app%改行%A communication of the Store app with Windows Runtime Component%改行%Target%改行%Creating WRC requires Windows 8 or later and Visual Studio 2012 or later.%改行%Change Visual Studio debug configuration%改行%If you want to create WRC work with the Store app type is JavaScript or C++.%改行%Change the [Debugger Type] to the [Mixed(Managed and Native)]. It is in the [Debugging] under the [Configuration Property] of the [Project Property Pages]. To display the Dialog, right-click Store App project select the context menu item [Properties].%改行%If the Store app type is C# or VB.%改行%Right-click Store App project select the context menu item [Properties].%改行%More advanced reference%改行%リンク（http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/apps/dn169426(v=vs.94).aspx）%改行%リンク（http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/windows/apps/hh750311.aspx）%改行%Article%改行%What is WRC. There is a restriction.%改行%How to communicate WRC and the Store app.%改行%The way use the roaming data is very simple.%改行%リンク（http://1drv.ms/PLJrXX）%改行%リンク（http://1drv.ms/PMaYIF）%改行%リンク（http://1drv.ms/PO2O2o）%改行%What is WRC. There is a restriction.%改行%WRC is produces a metadata file.%改行%WRC and a store app communicates via Windows metadata that can understand certain data types such as the primitive data types for parameter types or return types. Therefore types of WRC can not change after compile. It means that WRC must be created with sealed class and public static properties.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/InteroperableWRCAndWinRT.png）%改行%What is WRC. There is a restriction.%改行%WRC is effective when reuses business logic.%改行%If reusable logical code is exist, it’s better that the code includes a property as represent the progress of own processing. The property should be defined as the primitive data type with static public property. Though, there is a little hard way that use the custom type property by late binding.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/WRCGiveUsefulEffectToBusinessLogicReusing.png）%改行%How to communicate WRC and the Store app%改行%There is three ways%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/ThreeWaysToCommunicateWRCAndStoreApp.png）%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/ArrowRepresentsMoreTimeConsuming.png）%改行%The way using the roaming data is very simple%改行%In WRC, write roaming data. And get opposite%改行%WRC fires the Framework event to notify roaming data is changed, in case C# is like bellow.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/RoamingSettingsDataChanged.png）%改行%In the store app, get the roaming data updated using the event listener. Follow is JavaScript sample.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/HookRoamingDataChanged.png）%改行%Create HTML 5 Store app%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/ModifyDefaultJs.png）%改行%Put the Progress Bar Control on default.html%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/AddProgressBarAtHTML.png）%改行%Create a static method of shield class%改行%Create new project using WRC project template of Visual Studio, then sealed class is created by default. Change the class name by changing the file name of the class, so create a public static methods inside.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/CreateWRC.png）%改行%Call the method of WRC%改行%Add reference of WRC (NotifyProgressFromWRC project) to the Store app (HTMLWRCRelation JavaScript project that is Startup project)%改行%Create simple code for call the method of WRC.%改行%図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/AddReference.png）図（http://processtuneblog.azurewebsites.net/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/CallMethodOfWRC.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-8-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2013/08/26/wpf-app-that-display-excel-file-2/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2014/04/09/using-office-365-authentication-in-windows-8-store-apps/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2014/01/20/view-the-processing-status-of-the-windows-runtime-component-to-windows-store-app/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Download a client app includes an authentication feature for Azure Active Directory account – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Microsoft Graph,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Download a client app includes an authentication feature for Azure Active Directory account%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AuthenticationAuthorizationSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/11/30/）%改行%Microsoft Azure provides a super-easy way to create an app that includes an authentication feature for the Azure Active Directory account.%改行%There are only three steps, the first step is creating the Azure Active Directory application, the next step is to download code from the Quickstart section, then the last step is executing app from Visual studio. It is no coding but is the operation of Visual Studio.%改行%This super-easy way is described in this article.%改行%・Create Azure Active Directory application%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）described an overview of the authentication feature provided by Microsoft Graph API. And it authorizes the Azure Active Directory account as four types of grant flow of OAuth 2.0.リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）also described the ‘authorization code’ grant type of authentication as the basic type. Amid described it, also how to create the Azure Active Directory application was described. So please refer toリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）.%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）described using ‘OAuth 2.0 <debugger/>’ instead of a client app. This article describes how to download a client app from the Azure portal and confirm the execution of its authentication flow.%改行%・Download the code of an app%改行%When going to the Azure portal and select [Azure Active Directory] – [App registrations] – target application select, it shows [Overview] section, so in case of select [Quickstart] section, it shows [Download the code sample] button. Press [Make this change for me] button of [Step 1] section.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/step1configure.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/QuickstartStep1.png）%改行%It configures an app to use a redirect URL for the local development environment with the port number of IIS Express.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/QuickstartStep1Done.png）%改行%・Visual Studio common pattern to open the file created under other environments.%改行%Steps below do show this code sample but these steps are common steps that have to do for opening the file created under other environments.%改行%If the download is done and extracts it then right-click at the file of the extracted folder and select [Properties] item of the context menu for unlocking file protection.%改行%It unlocked, open [sln] file with Visual Studio.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/UnlockFileSelect.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Unlock.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/FileOpen.png）%改行%Amid file open with Visual Studio, Visual Studio show the confirmation to restart under a different credential if the code asserts more permission needs ‘run as administrator’.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/FileOpenConfirm.png）%改行%And also shows confirmation to open the project because the code is not created in a fully trusted environment for the PC.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/FileOpenConfirm2.png）%改行%When the solution(or project) that is not created with the PC opens for the first time, it is good to do that ‘Restore NuGet Packages’ which it is necessary or not.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/restoreNuget.png）%改行%As of press a list item of [Start Debugging] box([IIS Express] selected), the app shows login confirmation with an explanation that the app access to user resources. After the second time, the app shows the Account ID input dialog, the app continues the Password input dialog.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/login.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/password.png）%改行%Trancesion to Home of app when login process complete.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/pageStart.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/10/30/microsoft-graph-api-provides-several-grant-types-of-the-oauth-2-0-authorization-framework/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/12/26/how-to-acquire-an-authorization-code-of-microsoft-graph-api-login-feature-with-asp-net-core-web-app/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/11/30/download-a-client-app-includes-an-authentication-feature-for-azure-active-directory-account/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: x:Bind Binding – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%x:Bind Binding%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/07/25/）%改行%A data binding architecture is important feature for client side MVC. In XAML until windows 8.1, it had been implemented by binding path mechanism only. From windows 10, a new compile time binding mechanism by “x:Bind” keyword of x name space(http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml) has offering. br>%改行%リンク（https://github.com/Microsoft/Windows-universal-samples/tree/6370138b150ca8a34ff86de376ab6408c5587f5d/Samples/XamlBind）explains that it is fast rendering processing to display, and a bind error given on compile time may make development to more productive.%改行%This article constructed with three sections. As first, XAML description part, and second part is about data, the last is note of xBind.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Samples-UWPSamples/tree/master/xBind）%改行%・XAML%改行%It’s most important aspect for creating XAML is that it should be written to define semantic construct same as a contents which is displayed. For more ease maintenance, data context for XAML must be created as possible as simple.%改行%In case of Initial page of an app, A data context of the page structed by menu and first content must be structed a data context of menu list and first content respectively. Thus when item of menu list is changed, first page contents replaced with contents of item of menu list.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/xBindViewModel.jpg）%改行%To omit about page contents in this article, describes just menu and application title. In aspect of contents, every contents has page title section and lead paragraph, contents body. It is created by general data context as base data context. There is described at follows Data section.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/xBindInitial.jpg）%改行%If needs the copy, use the GitHub Gist is below.%改行%‘x:Bind’ syntax binding mode is one time binding as default. In abobe figure, there is three bindings which mode is one time binding. First one is bind to the property of data context of the XAML, the last one is bind to the property of data context of page contents which defined by menu item selection.%改行%・Data%改行%The second binding of above figure binds to Menu property of the XAML. The property is Listtype.%改行%public classMenuItemContextbr>%改行%{br>%改行%public stringPageTitle {get; set; }br>%改行%public stringLead {get; set; }br>%改行%publicContentTypesCurrentType {get; set; }br>%改行%}br>%改行%public classProfileContent : MenuItemContextbr>%改行%{br>%改行%public ProfileContent()br>%改行%{br>%改行%CurrentType =ContentTypes.Profile;br>%改行%Lead =“Aquiring from SNS or idenity provider”;br>%改行%PageTitle =“Create Profile”;br>%改行%}br>%改行%…br>%改行%}br>%改行%public enumContentTypes: intbr>%改行%{br>%改行%Profile = 0,br>%改行%…br>%改行%Otherbr>%改行%}br>%改行%public classMainVMbr>%改行%{br>%改行%publicMainVM()br>%改行%{br>%改行%Menu =newList<MenuItemContext>(); br>%改行%Current = newProfileContent();br>%改行%Menu.Add(Current);br>%改行%AppTitle =“My App”;br>%改行%}br>%改行%publicList<MenuItemContext> Menu {get;set; } br>%改行%public stringAppTitle {get;set; } br>%改行%}br>%改行%The Menu property is Listtype, thus one menu item bind to a data context of MenuItemContext type. In order to notify MenuItemContext type to the data context of XAML, use ‘x:DataType’ attribute of DataTemplate of ItemTemplate of the list XAML. Set “local:MenuItemContext” value to the attribute(local is defined by XAML namespace to ‘using:StatefulMiddleWareUWP’). ‘x:Bind’binding is compile time binding mechanism, thus needs solve every types in XAML.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/xBind.jpg）%改行%With this structure, can develop other pages by extending MenuItemContext type.%改行%・Note%改行%1. Default binding mode is OneTime.%改行%2. Needs solve every types in XAML.%改行%3. Can bind event. But XAML must be described as possible as simple. if page contents is not need change an event dynamically, it should not be used event binding to data context, it should be defined by code behind.%改行%For additional, data context of XAML is ViewModel property of code behind.%改行%public sealed partial classMainPage : Pagebr>%改行%{br>%改行%publicMainVMViewModel {get;set; }br>%改行%publicMainPage()br>%改行%{br>%改行%this.InitializeComponent();br>%改行%ViewModel =newMainVM();br>%改行%}br>%改行%private voidMenuList_SelectionChanged(objectsender,SelectionChangedEventArgse)br>%改行%{br>%改行%ListBoxmenuListBox = senderasListBox;br>%改行%…br>%改行%}br>%改行%}br>%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/07/25/microsoft-uwp-samples-helps-you-to-create-your-app/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/08/01/system-launcher/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/07/25/xbind-binding/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Scope control of the Microsoft Graph. – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Universal Apps,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Scope control of the Microsoft Graph.%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/27/）%改行%The Microsoft Graph has aspect of an information gateway of Microsoft services such as Outlook or Calendar, OneDrive, SharePoint and so on, also has feature of access control gateway of these services too.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeBothAuth.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/IntelligentCloudAndIntelligentEdgeBothResult.png）%改行%Any system has responsibility that assert appropriate authority to user when accessing information management by system. So system which use Microsoft Graph have to be specified with appropriate scope of information provided by it.%改行%An appropriate scope have to change with some cases which is read or write some files to OneDrive or read mail and so on.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Graph/tree/master/MSGraphScopeControl）%改行%リンク（https://www.microsoft.com/ja-jp/dev/products/community.aspx）is free%改行%・AuthenticationHelper class%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/Graph/blob/master/MicrosoftGraph/AuthenticationHelper.cs）is for only Microsoft Graph, so modify it for become to generic OAuth authentication class%改行%・Class for Microsoft Graph%改行%Create the class which use Microsoft Graph, It extends from provider base class.%改行%This class should have a feature of Microsoft Graph, for example, Microsoft Graph has authentication types that for the Microsoft account and the Organization account. So below code is added to the class.%改行%public enum TenantType { common, organizations, consumers, tenantFriendlyName, tenantGUID }%改行%And has Scope types for user information or mail and so on. So below code is added to the class.%改行%[Flags] public enum UserScopeType { Read=1, ReadWrite=2, ReadBasicAll=4, ReadAll=8, ReadWriteAll=16, InviteAll=32 }%改行%And has information access levels which are changed by the way to request types respectively. The Microsoft account is restricted than the Organization account.%改行%public class User { public ListBasicInfo = new List(); public ListOrganizationInfo = new List(); public User() { BasicInfo.Add("displayName"); BasicInfo.Add("givenName"); BasicInfo.Add("mail"); BasicInfo.Add("photo"); BasicInfo.Add("surname"); BasicInfo.Add("userPrincipalName"); OrganizationInfo.Add("aboutMe"); OrganizationInfo.Add("birthday"); OrganizationInfo.Add("hireDate"); OrganizationInfo.Add("interests"); OrganizationInfo.Add("mobilePhone"); OrganizationInfo.Add("mySite"); OrganizationInfo.Add("pastProjects"); OrganizationInfo.Add("photo"); OrganizationInfo.Add("preferredName"); OrganizationInfo.Add("responsibilities"); OrganizationInfo.Add("schools"); OrganizationInfo.Add("skills"); } public string displayName { get; set; } public string givenName { get; set; } public string mail { get; set; } public string photo { get; set; } public string surname { get; set; } public string userPrincipalName { get; set; } public string jobTitle { get; set; } public string mobilePhone { get; set; } public string officeLocation { get; set; } public string preferredLanguage { get; set; } public string aboutMe { get; set; } public string birthday { get; set; } public string hireDate { get; set; } public string interests { get; set; } public string mySite { get; set; } public string pastProjects { get; set; } public string preferredName { get; set; } public string responsibilities { get; set; } public string schools { get; set; } public string skills { get; set; } } }%改行%And there is many scopes Microsoft Graph provide.%改行%リンク（https://developer.microsoft.com/ja-jp/graph/docs/concepts/permissions_reference）%改行%リンク（https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/docs/concepts/permissions_reference）%改行%・Code behind%改行%If below code is defined in some method of code behind when authentication execute, it work well. All code is end of this article.%改行%switch (provider.CurrentProviderTypes) { case ProviderBase.ProviderTypes.MicrosoftGraph: var token = AuthenticationHelper.TokenForUser; var oAuthClient = AuthenticationHelper.GetAuthenticatedClient(); if (oAuthClient != null) { var user = await oAuthClient.Me.Request().GetAsync(); (provider as MSGraph).AccessToken = AuthenticationHelper.TokenForUser; (provider as MSGraph).TokenExpire = AuthenticationHelper.Expiration; result = user.GivenName; } else { result = "Internal Error when creating OAuth client"; } NotifyUser(result); break;%改行%・xaml.cs%改行%・Microsoft Graph class%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/20/intelligent-cloud-with-microsoft-graph/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/11/02/how-to-use-the-qna-manker-api-well/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2017/09/27/scope-control-of-the-microsoft-graph/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Create knowledge base from online FAQ – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Cognitive Service,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Office App,Office Web App,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText:
%改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Cognitive Services QnA Maker – Create knowledge base from online FAQ%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AISeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/04/30/）%改行%I want to describe how to create chatbot client communicate with the QnA Maker API. Although, at this article have to describe preparation for creating chatbot client app. If already created Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services QnA Maker, please skip this article then check next.%改行%A chatbot responds using knowledge base when chatbot is asked some question. QnA Maker makes creating first knowledge base easily.%改行%・Solution idea%改行%Microsoft provides great guidance to design a solution architecture for chatbot which using QnA Maker API atリンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/solution-ideas/articles/information-chatbot）.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Information-Chatbot.png）%改行%・Over view%改行%A knowledge base creating feature of QnA Maker lead creating process as step by step.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-a-knowledge-base.png）%改行%・The analyze feature for FAQ web page%改行%I wanna show you a sample to describe that the analyze feature for FAQ web page provided by the QnA Maker is so smart.%改行%Rolling Stone, LLC, a subsidiary of Penske Business Media, LLC publishes article ‘リンク（https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-news/qa-eddie-van-halen-177607/）‘ on the web site, I want to use this web site as sample to describe how useful the QnA Maker API is. This page is not create aim to work well online FAQ page analyze feature, because I chosen it as random one from search engine results. Nevertheless, the feature made very great results.%改行%Below is a part of page source of the sample FAQ page.%改行%

Will old fans like this record?
 A lot of people hate it. It’s the third incarnation of the band. It’s not a departure, but we’re branching out. I was listening to the radio yesterday and the DJ was just rambling over it, saying Gary sounds like a weak Sammy Hagar. Then they took phone calls and one guy was like, “Ah, I still like Dave.” So obviously he’s not gonna like it. What’s funny to me is that this isn’t international espionage — we’re a fucking rock & roll band. People, get a life, will ya? If you can’t, get on the Internet and join the club.

%改行%There is no ID attribute or Name attribute in the sample FAQ page source, but has only style class definition.%改行%The online FAQ page analyze feature of the QnA Maker can understand that the content is question text using “?”. And also can understand that another part is the answer of it, with structure of the contents.%改行%・Step 1 Create Microsoft Azure QnA Service of Cognitive Service%改行%I created QnA Maker as free, F0 cost level and F search lebel. Sorry for Japanese screen shot.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/AzureQnAMaker.png）%改行%・Step 2 Select items of ‘Step 1’%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-a-knowledge-base-Step-2.png）%改行%・Step 3 and 4 Define name and source%改行%I defined used source as the name, this way is useful for maintenance such as relearning because correct answer ratio of chatbot is depended on knowledge base.%改行%I used default text to Default answer text of multi-turn extraction. If the chatbot is used in specific circumstanse, change this text such as ‘do you want to know one of below ?’ because multi-turn extraction is used when chatbot selected multiple answers and needs to do continuous conversation.%改行%And set online FAQ page address to URL.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-a-knowledge-base-Step-34.png）%改行%・Chit-chat and Create%改行%Using Chit-chat section to control atmosphere of conversation. This default set of Q and A helps establishing character of chatbot.(see ‘リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cognitive-services/qnamaker/how-to/chit-chat-knowledge-base）‘ of Microsoft Docs)%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Create-a-knowledge-base-Step-5.png）%改行%・Test%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Test-a-knowledge-base.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/My-knowledge-base.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/cognitive-service/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/office-web-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/03/29/launch-correct-app-by-specific-account/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/06/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-make-embed-code-for-bot-client-app/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/04/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-create-knowledge-base-from-online-faq/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Get user information of Azure Active Directory account using Microsoft Graph API – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Microsoft Graph,Office App,ReactJS.NET,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText:
%改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Get user information of Azure Active Directory account using Microsoft Graph API%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AuthenticationAuthorizationSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/02/29/）%改行%Took a token at sign in using the ‘authorization code’ grant type authentication flow inリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5280）. So the token has the ‘user.read’ permission. Use the token, this article describes how to take user information of the Azure Active Directory account.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/SetUserNameToView）%改行%・Setting configuration for development environment%改行%As first, download the code sample, restore packages and run debug done, then modify ‘Sign In’ action in the ‘Account’ controller of [Controllers] folder at the Solution Explorer to usable for the development environment.%改行%using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc; namespace React.Sample.Webpack.CoreMvc.Controllers { public class AccountController : Controller { [Route("Account/SignIn")] [ResponseCache(Location = ResponseCacheLocation.None, NoStore = true)] public void SignIn() { var tenant = "__YOUR TENANT__";//this grant_type allows common var clientId = "__APP CLIENT ID__"; var redirectUri = "http://localhost:9457/home"; Response.Redirect("https://login.microsoftonline.com/" + tenant + "/oauth2/v2.0/authorize?client_id=" + clientId + "&redirect_uri=" + redirectUri + "&grant_type=implicit&response_type=code&scope=User.Read"); } } }%改行%Modify lines of the variable ‘tenant’ and ‘clientId’ to useable for the development environment(11th line and 12th line).%改行%And open ‘Index’ action in the ‘Home’ controller of [Controllers] folder at the Solution Explorer, put a breakpoint at the 45th line. Then run debug and confirm acquiring ‘code’ and ‘state’ variables.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/code.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/state.png）%改行%・Get User Information%改行%Return to the [Home] controller of the [Controllers] folder at the Solution Explorer, insert code below before the line of putting the ‘signIn’ variable to the ‘ViewBag.IsSignin’ container at the [Index] action.%改行%if (signIn) accountName = new AccessGraph().GetUser(token); if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(accountName)) { //Regist '髙尾 哲朗（Tetsuro Takao）' as Azure Active Directory account. accountName = string.Join("", Regex.Matches(accountName, @"[a-z | A-Z]*")).Trim(); } ViewBag.AccountName = accountName;%改行%Insert code below to create the ‘GetUser’ method in the ‘AccessGraph’ class.%改行%public string GetUser(string token) { string result = string.Empty; MSGraphUser user = null; var url = $"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/"; using (var httpClient = new HttpClient()) { httpClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + token); var res = httpClient.GetAsync(url).Result; string resultJson = res.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result; if (res.IsSuccessStatusCode) { user = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(resultJson); result = user.displayName; } } return result; } public class MSGraphUser { public string displayName { get; set; } public string surname { get; set; } public string givenName { get; set; } public string id { get; set; } public string userPrincipalName { get; set; } public List businessPhones { get; set; } public string jobTitle { get; set; } public string mail { get; set; } public string mobilePhone { get; set; } public string officeLocation { get; set; } public string preferredLanguage { get; set; } }%改行%・Exchange a view when sign in and sign out%改行%At the last, Open the ‘_Layout.cshtml’ in [Shared] folder of [Views] folder to modify a view. Modify like the below code as wrap the [a] tag of the ‘sign in’ part.%改行%
@ViewBag.Title
Menu items
@if (ViewBag.IsSignin) { @ViewBag.AccountName } else { ... }
@ViewBag.Message
%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/SetUserNameToView）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/GetUser.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/reactjs-net/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/01/31/programmable-authentication-flow-for-accessing-to-microsoft-graph/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/13/cognitive-services-qna-maker-setting-azure-bot-service/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/02/29/get-user-information-of-azure-active-directory-account-using-microsoft-graph-api/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Create reverse proxy using dotnet minimal – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Docker,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Nginx,Reverce Proxy,SlideShow,Static web Apps,vim,Visual Studio,WSL2
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Create reverse proxy using dotnet minimal%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/GenericHostSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/01/15/）%改行%If you develop some api that is used from external applications, you have to create caller side dummy app for develop your api. Or if already API caller side app exists, for decleasing cost to create development environment, or needs various result patterns as simulate for real functions, there are efficient for development that inbound connection create tool such as ngrok or Localtunnel and so on.%改行%Even if in the case of impossible that use these tools for aspect of security or policies, there is able to create kind of similer feature use ASP.NET Core Web API minimal option template to accept requests of various test patterns from its external applications.%改行%This article describes how to create reverse proxy as inbound connection creator.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/svgiconcoloringweb）%改行%・Swagger feature of minimal option%改行%ASP.NET Core Web API minimal option template has already swagger service feature. It is great impact for productivity of development team.リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/aspnet/core/tutorials/getting-started-with-swashbuckle?view=aspnetcore-6.0&tabs=visual-studio?WT.mc_id=DT-MVP-4029060）, althogh it is very fast creation that using ASP.NET Core Web API minimal option template if want to create a develoment server.%改行%[Only swagger service feature] Install-Package Swashbuckle.AspNetCore -Version 6.2.3 [Only swagger json generator feature] Install-Package Swashbuckle.AspNetCore.SwaggerGen -Version 6.3.0 [Only swagger UI feature] Install-Package Swashbuckle.AspNetCore.SwaggerUI -Version 6.3.0 [ASP.NET Core Web API minimal option] dotnet new webapi -minimal%改行%The command [dotnet new webapi -minimal] generate code of Swagger below. So if install these components respectively, can build Swagger feature to Blazor Server App template or ASP.NET Core Web App template, ASP.NET Core gRPC Service template and so on with same procedure.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/seagger.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/swaggerCode.png）%改行%・Reverse proxy%改行%Though this article describes very simple reverse proxy, this sample project is base of development server for developer team, and for API development, it is able to use as development log server or team members authentication/management server, load test server.リンク（https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/updates/azure-service-fabric-mesh-preview-retirement/）although, the service had these team development support features includes swagger service and was very useful for team development. These features are important for team development, so have to create development server for team development.%改行%It is super easy to create reverse proxy use ASP.NET Core Web API minimal option template. Modify the [MapGet] method of the [Program.cs] file to redirect a request to another URL. HTTP Get request to the Route URL redirect to the port number [5080] in the case of the code below.%改行%app.MapGet("/", context => { context.Response.Redirect("http://localhost:5080",permanent:true); return Task.FromResult(0); });%改行%Default port of the template is the port number [5078], so use the port number [5080] as redirect port.%改行%Menbers of the development team does not know infromation involving redirect, so create information as Swagger. When access this server with browser, since the request redirect to the port number [5080] temporalily, then type manually the address [localhost:5078/settingsInfo] into the address box of the browser. swagger can show information because create the feature below.%改行%var hosts = app.Configuration.GetSection("ServiceHosts"); app.MapGet("/settingsInfo", () => { var result = string.Empty; foreach(var i in hosts.AsEnumerable()){ result += string.Format("{0}={1}",i.Key,i.Value) + Environment.NewLine; } return result; });%改行%This code use the [appsettings.json] file to define a settings for host services address of microservices as example.%改行%{ "ServiceHosts":{ "/":"localhost:5080", "8080":"localhost:8080", "8081":"localhost:8081", "8082":"localhost:8082", "8083":"localhost:8083" }, "Logging": { "LogLevel": { "Default": "Information", "Microsoft.AspNetCore": "Warning" } }, "AllowedHosts": "*" }%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/settingsinfo.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/docker/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/nginx/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/nginx/reverce-proxy/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/static-web-apps/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/wsl2/vim/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/wsl2/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2021/12/01/nginx-run-on-windows-subsystem-for-linux-2/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/02/01/node-mongodb-container-for-azure-static-web-apps/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2022/01/15/create-reverse-proxy-using-dotnet-minimal/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Launch correct app by specific account – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Launch correct app by specific account%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/03/29/）%改行%This article explains how to launch specific application for specific account, The logon script mechanism is best for the situation.%改行%string current = Environment.CurrentDirectory; DirectoryInfo d = new DirectoryInfo(current); RegistryKey regkey = Registry.CurrentUser.OpenSubKey(@"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run", true); regkey.SetValue("", Environment.CommandLine); regkey.Close();%改行%This code is fit to deploy at [RestrictForSpecificUser] method of [DataAccessLayer] class which is in ‘features’ folder explained atリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4781）. Although, the method little bit become fat meaning, so it divides story of ‘specific user’ and feature for ‘restrict’.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/WPFLockdownSample6）%改行%public class ProcessController { public ListKillProcess() { Listresult = new List(); Log log = new Log() { LogType= LogType.Information, Message= string.Format("kill processes start ..."), OccurredTime= DateTime.Now, OperatorName=GetType().Name }; Process[] processes = Process.GetProcesses(); foreach (Process p in processes) { try { if (p.ProcessName == "explore") p.Kill(); } catch (Exception ex) { log = new Log(); log.LogType = LogType.Information; log.Message = string.Format("Fault killing process Windows explore : " + ex.Message); log.OccurredTime = DateTime.Now; log.OperatorName = GetType().Name; result.Add(log); } } return result; } }%改行%And there is only deferent with ‘Message’ property when log put out, so it move to new method of [DataAccessLayer] class in ‘Logging.cs’ file.%改行%public partial class DataAccessLayer { public DataAccessLayer Currentfacade { get; private set; } public DataAccessLayer() { ... Currentfacade = this; } ... public void AppendWriteLogs(Listlogs, bool reverse = true) ... public void Logging(string message) { Listlogs = new List(); Log log = new Log() { LogType = LogType.Information, Message = message, OccurredTime = DateTime.Now, OperatorName = GetType().Name }; logs.Add(log); AppendWriteLogs(logs); } }%改行%The [KillProcess] method become code below since make logging code to be simple and to do logging when log occurred. The [KillProcess] method not responds log information, but Boolean type execution result.%改行%public bool KillProcess() { bool result = false; DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging("kill processes start ..."); Process[] processes = Process.GetProcesses(); foreach (Process p in processes) { try { if (p.ProcessName == "explore") p.Kill(); DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging("killing process : " + p.ProcessName); result = true; } catch (Exception ex) { DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging(string.Format("Fault killing process {0} : {1}", p.ProcessName,ex.Message)); } } return result; }%改行%This feature [KillProcess] method and [CollapseDesktopIcon] method of explains follow is not at [DataAccessLayer] class, but create new class [ProcessController] class or [UIController] class. The figure below is represents these classes added at ‘Features’ folder of the solution root as Visual Studio Japanese edition.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/createnewClasses.png）%改行%・Collaps disktop icons using redistry%改行%You can control which show or collapsed icons of the desktop use the registry sub key [Explorer] of the key [\HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies]. So use code below when specific user login use logon script of the user, the user almost restricted using with explorer process killing, not complete. If user use key [Ctl]+[Alt]+[Del], the user can launch new process, although you can other several restriction for it, such as the Group policy and so on. This article not explains them.%改行%public class UIController { public bool CollapseDesktopIcon() { RegistryKey regkey = Registry.CurrentUser.OpenSubKey(@"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies", true); regkey.CreateSubKey("Explorer"); regkey.Close(); regkey = Registry.CurrentUser.OpenSubKey(@"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer", true); regkey.SetValue("NoDesktop", 1, RegistryValueKind.DWord); regkey.Close(); return true; } }%改行%・Devided ‘RestrictForSpecificUser’ method from features%改行%This is simple flow of specific user in the ‘RestrictForSpecificUser’ method code below.%改行%public bool RestrictForSpecificUser() { DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging(string.Format("User[{0}] is logon : ", CurrentUserName)); if (CurrentUserName == "appOperator" || CurrentUserName == "appUser") { new ProcessController().KillProcess(); DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging(string.Format("Set logon script for user[{0}] : ", CurrentUserName)); new ProcessController().SetLogonScript(string.Empty); DataAccessLayer.Currentfacade.Logging(string.Format("Clear desktop of user[{0}] : ", CurrentUserName)); new UIController().CollapseDesktopIcon(); } return true; }%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/03/28/logging-file-save-to-microsoft-azure-part-2/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/04/30/cognitive-services-qna-maker-create-knowledge-base-from-online-faq/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/03/29/launch-correct-app-by-specific-account/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: kiosk mode operation design 2 – Processtune Blog
Categories: Active Directory,Azure Active Directory,kiosk mode,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,SlideShow,Visual Studio,Windows 10 App,Windows Store App,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%kiosk mode operation design 2%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/06/30/）%改行%This article is follow ofリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4513）. The article includes steps below.%改行%1.Run Visual Studio as Administrator.%改行%2.Create new blank WPF.%改行%3.Midify App.xaml and App.xaml.cs to execute App_Startup method of App.xaml.cs at first.%改行%figures of Visual Studio Japanese edition.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/createnew.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/solutionExplorer01.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/solutionExplorer02.png）%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/WPFLockdownSample1）%改行%・Implement a flow of multiple accounts which for multiple operation scenarios%改行%As scenarios ofリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4513）, create four accounts below.%改行%1.’appUser’ account is used to use some user application.%改行%2.’appOperator’ account is used to manage this user application settings.%改行%3.’maintenanceOperator’ account is used to install this user application, and to set several device settings for this user application.%改行%4.’superUser’ account is top level administrator of the device.%改行%Follow article [リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4551）] explains how to create these four accounts.%改行%And [リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4590）] explains how to send a log file which is described at next step to Azure Blob Storage.%改行%As next step, check existing of a log file to judge current execution is first time or not. If it is first time, create four accounts and assign their permissions. If it is not first time, check sign in account and navigate correct flow respectively for individual account.%改行%For ‘maintenanceOperator’ account, create maintenance console which leads maintenance operator to maintenance tasks.%改行%For ‘appUser’ account, create an application which runs like the kiosk mode.%改行%For ‘appOperator’ account, the application for ‘appUser’ account modify that the application can execute maintenance mode.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/WPFLockdownSamlpe2）%改行%・Sample code of a flow of multiple operation scenarios%改行%Overall of the flow control is below.%改行%void App_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e) { //1.Check existing of log file. //2.if (!logFile.Exists) current execution is first time execution, //so create four accounts. And set logon script respectively for individual account, //run user application as normal mode for "appOperator", run user application //as maintenance mode for "appOperator", "maintenanceOperator" will expire out //while 24 hours which means maintenance working time. //3.if (logFile.Exists) check current user //4.if (UserName == "maintenanceOperator") navigate to MaintenanceWindow //5.if (UserName == "appOperator") quiet this app. This account has specific automatic //run application when this account sign in. //6.if (UserName == "appUser") quiet this app. This account has specific automatic run //application when this account sign in. }%改行%Follow article [リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/packaging/app-capability-declarations）] explains how tocheck current user, and [リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/packaging/app-capability-declarations）] explains how to navigate user uselogon scriptof above code.%改行%void App_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e) { //[Logging and save the Log file to Microsoft Azure] explains how to send a log file //which is described at next step to Azure Blob Storage. //And explains creating model of log information for easy logging //LogModel message = new LogModel() { message = "check app files ..." }; //Check existing of log file. //Logging logging = new Logging(); //if (logging.ReadLogs().Count == 0) //{ // //[Local account creation] explains how to create these four accounts. // //And how to navigate use logon script // //CoreApplication.Exit(); //} //else //if (logFile.Exists) check current user //{ // //[Desktop UI control] explains how to check current user // //if (UserName == "maintenanceOperator") navigate to MaintenanceWindow // //if (UserName == "appOperator") quiet this app. This account has specific automatic //run application when this account sign in. // //if (UserName == "appUser") quiet this app. This account has specific automatic //run application when this account sign in. //} }%改行%Go next stepリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4590）%改行%orリンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/packaging/app-capability-declarations）%改行%,リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/packaging/app-capability-declarations）%改行%,リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/packaging/app-capability-declarations）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/technical-memo/active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/technical-memo/kiosk-mode/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/windows-10-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/universal-apps/windows-store-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/05/26/kiosk-mode-operation-design-1/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/07/28/logging-file-save-to-microsoft-azure-part-1/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/06/30/kiosk-mode-operation-design-2/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: How to set attributes of Azure Active Directory application for an app using JavaScript to authenticate users – Processtune Blog
Categories: .NET Core,Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Microsoft Graph,ReactJS.NET,SlideShow,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%How to set attributes of Azure Active Directory application for an app using JavaScript to authenticate users%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AuthenticationAuthorizationSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/09/01/）%改行%The ‘implicit grant type’ is one of the several grant types of ‘リンク（https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6749）‘ which Azure Active Directory endpoint supports.%改行%An application requests an access token to Azure Active Directory endpoint using any grant type of the four types. The article ‘Create Azure Active Directory application’ described the differences between the types.%改行%The ‘implicit grant type’ omits a broker credentials such as an authorization code, because it is designed for accessing from JavaScript such as single page application(Henceforth called SPA).%改行%This article describes how to set attributes of the Azure Active Directory application for using ‘implicit grant type’ to acquire token from JavaScript of a client application. Then describes how to create an application using Microsoft Authentication Library (Hereinafter referred to as ‘MSAL’).%改行%・Set Azure Active Directory application to allow implicit grant flow%改行%The article ‘リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5085）‘ described how to create Azure Active Directory application. And the article ‘リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5435）‘ describes how to set attributes of the Azure Active Directory application for several permissions. Please refer to these articles if you need them.%改行%To be available implicit grant flow of Azure Active Directory application, open the Microsoft Azure portal, then select [Azure Active Directory] – [App registrations] – (select target application) – [Authentication] – ‘Implicit grant’ section, and check [Access tokens] and [ID tokens] to on. Press [Save] button at last.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/AADAppAuthenticationImplicitSettings.png）%改行%ID Token is provided by the Open ID Connect identity layer above the OAuth 2.0 protocol of authentication flow of Azure Active Directory endpoint. It is able to use to verify destination of authenticating identity if you want.%改行%Azure Active Directory endpoint responds it as the JWT format, so you can use the following code to check.%改行%using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens; using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt; using System.Text; using System.Text.Json; using System.Linq; public string ReadJwt(string jwt, string payloadKey = "") { var result = string.Empty; if (jwt.Split('.').Count() != 3) return result; var tokenType = Base64UrlEncoder.Decode(jwt.Split('.').FirstOrDefault()); var typeElement = new JsonElement(); if(JsonDocument.Parse(tokenType).RootElement.TryGetProperty("typ",out typeElement)) { if (typeElement.GetString() == "JWT") { var token = new JwtSecurityTokenHandler().ReadJwtToken(jwt); if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(payloadKey)) { if (token.Payload.Iss.Contains("sts.windows.net")) { result = "microsoft"; } } else { result = token.Payload[payloadKey].ToString(); } } } return result; }%改行%This code checks an issuer. If the value of the iss attribute is the security token service of Microsoft, it has provided by the destination that I request. It guarantees that the token is not forged, and it has attributes you expect as ID Token format Microsoft provides.%改行%Access Token provided as JWT format that is same as ID Token. Access token( right figure below) and ID token( left figure below) is able to check a state of forgery by another process alternative of verifying JWT.%改行%If you set the state parameter at request timing of acquiring tokens, then check equivalent of it at timing of receive it.%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/tokensJWT.png）%改行%・Create SPA%改行%Please read quick start of SPA at Azure portal and try it. It is super easy to run because the downloaded SPA is already sat the settings for the Azure Active Directory app of the Azure portal.%改行%>>リンク（https://docs.microsoft.com/ja-jp/azure/active-directory/develop/msal-js-initializing-client-applications?WT.mc_id=DT-MVP-4029060）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStart.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStartImplicit.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStartDownload.png）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStartNpmInstallStart.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStartLogin.png）図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/azurePortalQuickStartAppRun.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/winui/net-core/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/reactjs-net/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/05/27/create-net-core-library/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/10/01/you-can-share-the-devices-profile-of-chrome-and-edge/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Title: Programmable authentication flow for accessing to Microsoft Graph – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Microsoft Graph,Office App,Office Web App,SlideShow,Visual Studio
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Programmable authentication flow for accessing to Microsoft Graph%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AuthenticationAuthorizationSeriesTitle.png）%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/31/）%改行%It is good that an app access user resource using minimum permission.%改行%Microsoft Graph API provides a token restricted by a scope that has minimum permission to access domain resources. Therefore the app to leverage these features has to use appropriate the grant type and the scope when acquires a token.%改行%As one of the ideas to correspond these case, the app would provide a feature which acquires a token with the ‘user.read’ scope when login and accessing information of self. And when accessing resources of the OneDrive of the login user, acquires another token with the ‘file.read’ scope without the ‘user.read’ scope.%改行%Using a token that has properly minimum permission to do execute per an individual feature of the app is better than using a token that has all permission that is enough to execute all features of the app.%改行%This article describes how to control tokens that have minimum permission to execute per feature. This article usesリンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/PreparForProgrammableAuthFlow）ofリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5435）.リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=5435）describes the scenario of the code sample, this article continues the 4th part of the scenario.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/ShareOneDriveItem）%改行%・Take token as change scope%改行%Create acquire a token that has the ‘files.readwrite’ permission and acquire a web link that sharing the OneDrive file of the user at the ‘Index’ action of the ‘Home’ controller. Insert below code after set the ‘GlobalName’ value of the ‘user’ object to the ViewBag.%改行%if (signIn) { new AccessGraph().SetUserInfo(user); //Regist '髙尾 哲朗（Tetsuro Takao）' as Azure Active Directory account. user.GlobalName = string.Join("", Regex.Matches(user.displayName, @"[a-z | A-Z]*")).Trim(); ViewBag.AccountName = user.GlobalName; var grant = "{\"password\":\"__PASSWORD__\",\"username\":\"__ACCOUNT__\"}"; var history = new AccessHistory(); history.GrantType = grant; history.Scope = "files.readwrite"; history.TenantID = user.AccessList.FirstOrDefault().TenantID; history.Redirect = user.AccessList.FirstOrDefault().Redirect; history.ClientId = user.AccessList.FirstOrDefault().ClientId; history.Secret = user.AccessList.FirstOrDefault().Secret; user.AccessList.Add(history); if (new AccessGraph().GetToken(user)) { var webLink = new AccessGraph().GetLink("01N7LZHZCQ2D4PKWJ4OJAKWEOBBJWTCOWG", user); } }%改行%・Create GetLink Method%改行%Create the ‘GetLink’ method in the ‘AccessGraph’ class as below.%改行%public class AccessGraph { public bool GetToken(ApplicationUser user) { ... } public string GetToken(string clientid, string secret, string redirect, string refreshtoken, string authCode, string tenant, string resource = "user.read") { ... } public string GetUser(string token) { ... } public void SetUserInfo(ApplicationUser account) { ... } public string GetLink(string id, ApplicationUser account) { string result = string.Empty; var token = account.AccessList.Where(t => Regex.IsMatch(t.Scope, @"files\.readwrite", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase)).FirstOrDefault(); if (token == null) return result; using (var httpClient = new HttpClient()) { httpClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + token.AuthTokens.access_token); var postBody = "{\"type\": \"edit\", \"scope\": \"anonymous\"}"; var content = new StringContent(postBody, Encoding.UTF8, "application/json"); var responseMessage = httpClient.PostAsync(string.Format("https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/drive/items/{0}/createLink", id), content).Result; var response = responseMessage.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().Result; if (responseMessage.IsSuccessStatusCode) { var resLink = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(response); result = resLink.link.webUrl; } } return result; } }%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/GetLINKCreate.png）%改行%・Create MSGraphLink Type%改行%Create the ‘MSGraphLink’ class to accept the response of Microsoft Graph API. Then go to the ‘Index’ action of the ‘Home’ controller, set the breakpoint after calling the ‘GetLink’ method of the ‘AccessGraph’ class.%改行%public class MSGraphLink { public string id { get; set; } public List roles { get; set; } public LinkType link { get; set; } } public class LinkType { public string type { get; set; } public string scope { get; set; } public string webUrl { get; set; } public ApplicationType application { get; set; } } public class ApplicationType { public string id { get; set; } public string displayName { get; set; } }%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/MSGraphLinkTypes.png）%改行%Execute the app with [F5] press, and confirm the method can acquire the web link.%改行%>>リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/ShareOneDriveItem）%改行%図（https://blog.processtune.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/GetLINKSuccess.png）%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-graph/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/office-app/office-web-app/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/slide-show/）リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/14/preparing-to-create-the-app-using-programmable-authentication-flow/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/04/20/appsettings-json-in-c-net-core-mvc-web-app/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2020/03/31/programmable-authentication-flow-for-accessing-to-microsoft-graph-2/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog. Title: Desktop UI controlling – Processtune Blog
Categories: Azure Active Directory,Microservice,Microsoft Azure,Visual Studio,未分類
BodyText: %改行%リンク（#content）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%リンク（#）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microsoft-azure/azure-active-directory/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/visual-studio/）%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/microservice/）%改行%Desktop UI controlling%改行%byリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/author/tetsuro-takao/）%改行%onリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/10/27/）%改行%This article explains how to provide Windows UI for individual specific account, it is local account and the account can use single application, and multiple applications respectively for individual accounts on a device. These conditions such as Windows kiosk mode device needs control Windows UI for individual accounts.リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4551）explains how to create accounts in these conditions.%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/WPFLockdownSample4）%改行%namespace WPFLockdownSample { public partial class App : Application { DataAccessLayer dataAccessLayer = new DataAccessLayer(); void App_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e) { ... if (dataAccessLayer.ReadLogs().Count == 0) { ... //CoreApplication.Exit(); } else { ... //[Desktop UI control] explains how to check current user and how to navigate use logon script //if (UserName == "maintenanceOperator") navigate to MaintenanceWindow //if (UserName == "appOperator") Set this app as logon script and quiet this app. Automatic //run this application when this account sign in. //if (UserName == "appUser") Set this app as logon script and quiet this app. Automatic //run this application when this account sign in. } ... } } }%改行%・Check current user%改行%This article explains how to check current user and then controls that specific user can’t use Windows explorer, and the user use Windows desktop which has not icons, therefor single application for the user launch when the user logon.%改行%Checking current user feature is implemented at [DataAccessLayer] class of ‘AccountManager.cs’%改行%using System.Security.Principal; ... public partial class DataAccessLayer { public string CurrentUserName { get { return WindowsIdentity.GetCurrent().Name; } } ... }%改行%リンク（https://github.com/TetsuroTakao/WPFLockdownSample5）%改行%In this article, check user name and change target flow by user name, if you need to control correct flow by group name, you can use [GroupPrincipal] object of ‘System.DirectoryServices.AccountManagement’ name space such as [GroupPrincipal group = GroupPrincipal.FindByIdentity(context, groupname);] statement (seeリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/?p=4551）). if [group] object responds ‘null’, the user is not in the group.%改行%In [App_Startup] method of [App] class, call [CurrentUserName] property of [DataAccessLayer] class to get current user name. Then check name and navigate correct flow.%改行%namespace WPFLockdownSample { public string UserName { get; private set; } public partial class App : Application { DataAccessLayer dataAccessLayer = new DataAccessLayer(); void App_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e) { ... if (dataAccessLayer.ReadLogs().Count == 0) { ... //CoreApplication.Exit(); } else { ... UserName = dataAccessLayer.CurrentUserName; //if (UserName == "maintenanceOperator") navigate to MaintenanceWindow if (UserName == "appOperator") { ... } if (UserName == "appUser") { ... } } ... } } }%改行%In [App_Startup] method of [App] class, call [CurrentUserName] property of [DataAccessLayer] class to get current user name. Then check name and navigate correct flow.%改行%・How to control single specific application which specific user can use%改行%These account appUser and appOperator can use only user application, so run next two steps and launch user application, to restrict these account to use controled Windows UI.%改行%1.Kill process of Windows explorer%改行%2.Clean Windows desktop of the user%改行%The code to kill process of the Windows explorer is below.%改行%public ListRestrictForSpecificUser() { //logging "User[{0}] is logon : ", CurrentUserName if (CurrentUserName == "appOperator" || CurrentUserName == "appUser") { //logging "Set logon script for user[{0}] : ", CurrentUserName //logging "Clear desktop of user[{0}] : ", CurrentUserName Process[] processes = Process.GetProcesses(); foreach (Process p in processes) { try { if (p.ProcessName == "explore") p.Kill(); } catch (Exception ex) { log = new Log(); log.LogType = LogType.Information; //"Fault killing process Windows explore : " + ex.Message log.Message = string.Format("Fault killing process Windows explore : " + ex.Message); log.OccurredTime = DateTime.Now; log.OperatorName = GetType().Name; result.Add(log); } } } return result; }%改行%・Clean Windows desktop%改行%Killing a process of the Windows explorer above, and cleaning Windows desktop is better into one step to restriction for specific account. The code how to clean Windows desktop is below.%改行%using Microsoft.Win32; ... regkey = Registry.CurrentUser.OpenSubKey(@"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies", true); regkey.CreateSubKey("Explorer"); regkey.Close(); regkey = Registry.CurrentUser.OpenSubKey(@"Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer", true); regkey.SetValue("NoDesktop", 1, RegistryValueKind.DWord); regkey.Close(); ...%改行%・Logon script for specific user%改行%The last step is set logon script. The code below omitted logging code.%改行%namespace WPFLockdownSample { public partial class App : Application { DataAccessLayer dataAccessLayer = new DataAccessLayer(); public string UserName { get; private set; } void App_Startup(object sender, StartupEventArgs e) { if (dataAccessLayer.ReadLogs().Count == 0) { //user account creation //CoreApplication.Exit(); } else { UserName = dataAccessLayer.CurrentUserName; //if (UserName == "maintenanceOperator") navigate to MaintenanceWindow if (UserName == "appOperator") { dataAccessLayer.RestrictForSpecificUser(); } if (UserName == "appUser") { dataAccessLayer.RestrictForSpecificUser(); } } } } }%改行%Categories:%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/category/%e6%9c%aa%e5%88%86%e9%a1%9e/）%改行%Tags:%改行%No Tag%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/08/31/local-account-creation/）%改行%Post navigation%改行%リンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2019/03/28/logging-file-save-to-microsoft-azure-part-2/）%改行%No responses yet%改行%Leave a Replyリンク（https://blog.processtune.com/2018/10/27/desktop-ui-controlling/#respond）%改行%Your email address will not be published.Required fields are marked*%改行%Comment*%改行%Name*%改行%Email*%改行%Website%改行%Save my name, email, and website in this browser for the next time I comment.%改行%© 2025 Processtune Blog.
